policyName: Aeostara Agentic Coding Policy — Apple macOS

rules.name: Native Apple Technologies Only
rules.description: Use only Swift, SwiftUI, Foundation, and Apple-provided frameworks. Build with Xcode-native projects or SwiftPM (Package.swift). No C++, no Objective-C++, no CMake, no vcpkg, no nlohmann/json, no Boost, no non-Apple third-party dependencies in shipped product paths.

rules.name: Sealed Domain Module
rules.description: AeostaraMacDomain is a sealed Swift module. Consumers import only its public API. No direct access to internal types.

rules.name: No Forsetti Dependency
rules.description: AeostaraMacDomain and AeostaraMacCLI must not import any Forsetti modules. Aeostara domain remains host-agnostic.

rules.name: Protocol-First Design
rules.description: All major components expose Swift protocols. Implementations use initializer-based dependency injection.

rules.name: Strict Value/Reference Discipline
rules.description: Prefer structs for data types (contracts). Use final classes only where reference semantics and DI are required. All classes are final. No hidden globals or singletons.

rules.name: One-Way Dependencies
rules.description: AeostaraMacDomain depends on Foundation only. AeostaraMacServices depends on AeostaraMacDomain and Foundation. AeostaraMacCLI depends on AeostaraMacDomain and AeostaraMacServices. Tests depend on domain and services. No reverse or lateral imports.

rules.name: Deterministic Behavior
rules.description: No random production behavior. All repair plans are deterministic. Same input must produce same output.

rules.name: Proprietary Licensing
rules.description: All source files carry proprietary header comment. Copyright (c) 2026 James Daley. All Rights Reserved.

rules.name: No Mutation Without Rollback
rules.description: Every file mutation must be preceded by a backup. Rollback must be available for every repair action.
